description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the elixir:latest Docker image and a global before_script that runs `mix local.hex --force` and `mix local.rebar --force`. Define three stages: setup, build, and test, and set the variable MIX_ENV to test. In the setup stage add a get-dependencies job that runs `mix deps.get` and stores the `deps` directory and `mix.lock` as artifacts that expire after 30 minutes. In the build stage add a compile job that runs `mix compile`. In the test stage add a tests job that runs `mix credo --strict` then `mix coveralls.json`, and configure the job to capture coverage using the regex `/\[TOTAL\]\s+(\d+\.\d+)%/`.
